summary: Iteration 9 - Complete testing of Promotions System & Program Updates. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend admin Promotions tab working with all form elements (type selector, discount type toggle, currency fields, applicability toggle). Program form shows new fields (session_mode, end_date, flagship toggle, duration tiers). Program detail page displays 3 duration tier cards with multi-currency pricing. Upcoming Programs section shows session mode badges and dates.

issues: Start date not showing in the info row (only End date shows). The start_date 'April 1, 2026' is stored in DB but display logic may need adjustment

action_items: Minor: Start date not displaying in Program Detail page info row - end date shows correctly but start date is missing
critical_code_review_comments: Promotions CRUD fully functional: POST, GET, PUT, DELETE /api/promotions
Promotion validation endpoint working: POST /api/promotions/validate correctly validates/rejects codes
Active promotions filter working: GET /api/promotions/active returns only valid active promotions
Program model has all new fields: session_mode, end_date, is_flagship, duration_tiers
Admin Promotions tab has: type selector (coupon/early_bird/limited_time), discount type toggle (percentage/fixed), AED/INR/USD fields for fixed amounts, applicability toggle (all/specific programs)
Admin Programs form has: session_mode dropdown, end_date field, flagship toggle, duration tiers section with add/remove/edit
Program detail page shows duration tier cards with multi-currency pricing (AED, INR, USD)
Upcoming Programs section shows session mode badges (Online (Zoom), Remote Healing) and dates

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, minor start date display issue)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test promotions NY2026 and EARLY50, existing flagship program AWRP (ID: 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel now has 12 tabs including Promotions. Program ID 1 (AWRP) is flagship with 3 duration tiers. Two test promotions exist: NY2026 (15% coupon) and EARLY50 (fixed AED 50/INR 1000/USD 15 early bird). Duration tiers are displayed as cards on program detail page with Select buttons. Upcoming Programs section shows session mode badges. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_promotions_iteration9.py. Phone OTP is MOCKED.
